\[
\mathbb {P} \left(\frac {1}{n} \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} \left(Z _ {i} - \mathbb {E} [ Z _ {i} ]\right) \leq - t\right) \leq \exp \left(- \frac {2 n t ^ {2}}{(b - a) ^ {2}}\right)

\[
\mathbb {P} \left(\left| \frac {1}{\mathcal {N} (i)} \sum_ {j \in \mathcal {N} (i)} (\mathbf {x} _ {j} [ k ] - \mathbb {E} [ \mathbf {x} _ {j} [ k ] ]) \right| \geq t _ {1}\right) \leq 2 \exp \left(- \frac {(d e g (i)) t _ {1} ^ {2}}{2 B ^ {2}}\right)
\]

\[
\mathbb {P} \left(\left\| \frac {1}{\mathcal {N} (i)} \sum_ {j \in \mathcal {N} (i)} (\mathbf {x} _ {j} - \mathbb {E} [ \mathbf {x} _ {j} ]) \right\| _ {2} \geq t _ {2}\right) \leq 2 \cdot l \cdot \exp \left(- \frac {(d e g (i)) t _ {2} ^ {2}}{2 B ^ {2} l}\right)
\]

input: \(\mathcal{G} = \{\mathcal{V},\mathcal{E}\}\) \(K,\{\mathcal{D}_c\}_{c = 0}^{|C| - 1}\) and \(\{\mathcal{V}_c\}_{c = 0}^{|C| - 1}\)   
output: \(\mathcal{G}' = \{\mathcal{V},\mathcal{E}'\}\)   
Initialize \(\mathcal{G}' = \{\mathcal{V},\mathcal{E}\}\) \(k = 1\) .   
while \(1\leq k\leq K\) do Sample node \(i\sim\) Uniform(V); Obtain the label, \(y_{i}\) of node i; Sample a number \(r\sim\) Uniform(0,1); //Uniform (0,1) denotes the continuous standard uniform distribution if \(r\leq \gamma\) then Sample a label \(c\sim\) Uniform(C \(\backslash \{y_i\})\) else Sample a label \(c\sim \mathcal{D}_{y_i}\) Sample node \(j\sim\) Uniform \((V_{c})\) Update edge set \(\mathcal{E}' = \mathcal{E}'\cup \{(i,j)\}\) \(k\gets k + 1\)   
return \(\mathcal{G}' = \{\mathcal{V},\mathcal{E}'\}\)
